2023October 22, 2023

🇺🇸 Saratoga Springs, NY, USA

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Saratoga Springs, United States, October 22, 2023 -- October 27, 2023

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2023-10-saratoga-springs-usa

20 Resolutions

1135Plenary
Launch minor revision of ISO 8000-115

1134Plenary
Launch ISO/DTR 8000-320 on AI training data quality

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1133Plenary
Launch an Amendment to ISO 17506 ed2

1132Plenary
Restart SMRL modules ISO/TS 1848, 1849, 1850, 1851, and 1853

Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its sincere appreciation to all the experts, delegates, and leaders for executing our hybrid plenary meeting successfully while undergoing numerous challenges.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
